description: Vital Recorder is open with case 0001.vital loaded, showing a ~3-hour intraoperative recording from a noncardiac surgery at Seoul National University Hospital (VitalDB open dataset). The track window displays arterial blood pressure (ART, red waveform), ECG leads (green), pulse oximetry (PLETH, blue), capnography (CO2, yellow), and airway pressure (AWP). The events panel shows four existing surgical milestones: Case started, Surgery started, Surgery finished, and Case finished. As an anesthesiologist assistant performing a retrospective case review, annotate this recording with at least three new event markers at distinct, non-clustered time positions during the intraoperative period (between Surgery started and Surgery finished). Each event should have a descriptive label reflecting a clinical observation, such as hemodynamic changes, medication administration, surgical phases, or monitoring events. Export the complete recording with all annotations to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\annotated_0001.csv in CSV format.
